Hero.title: Municipal sports lighting, built to last
Hero.subtitle: Get a budget evaluation for the standards-compliance and LED conversion of your sports fields in under 15 minutes — no on-site visit required.

WhoAreWe.title: Design Meets Engineering
WhoAreWe.body: Lightbase designs and manufactures architectural LED fixtures in Montréal for sports, institutional and industrial spaces. The Lightpro OM range is engineered for tall poles, high winds and Quebec winters — with a 10-year warranty and over 100,000 hours of life.

Solutions.title: The Lightpro OM range
Solutions.subtitle: Modules available now, DLC Premium certified, IP66, designed for 277-480 V.

om300.name: Lightpro OM300
om300.tagline: The municipal sports standard — Single, Double, Quadruple.

om400.name: Lightpro OM400
om400.tagline: Single module available. Double and Quadruple: late 2025.

CTA.title: Estimate your project in 15 minutes
CTA.subtitle: Budget estimation tool for LED conversion — fixtures, accessories and engineering. Installation excluded.

stepper.name: Name
stepper.guide: Complete the 4 steps below, then click « Next » at the top right to move on to the perimeter.
guideSteps: Type the address and pick the correct result from the suggestions
Adjust the position and zoom on the satellite map
Click « Confirm view » to lock the framing
Fill in the field name, activity and IES class
Click « Next » at the top right to move on to the perimeter
stepper.captureSuccess: ✓ View confirmed — click « Next » to continue

identity.title: Location
identity.subtitle: Name the field, pick the activity and capture the satellite view.
identity.name: Field name
identity.captureHint: Move/zoom the map and click "Confirm view"
identity.lockSuccess: View confirmed — you can now draw the perimeter.
identity.confirmRecaptureBody: Changing the view will erase the perimeter trace and all placed poles.

perimeter.title: Draw the perimeter
perimeter.howToBody: Click on the map to place each corner of your field. The shape closes automatically when you have at least 3 points.
perimeter.stepHint: Click the map to add points. Min. 3 points.
perimeter.validatedHint: ✓ Perimeter validated — go to the "Poles" step
perimeter.placeholderHint: Click on the map to add perimeter points

poles.title: Place the poles
poles.howToBody: Click on the map to place each existing pole. A popup will appear to enter its details.
poles.howToBodyEditExtra: Click an already placed pole to edit it.
poles.clickHint: Click on the map to place a pole
poles.editSubtitle: Enter the characteristics of this pole.

configuration.title: Luminaire configuration
configuration.subtitle: Set the options for this field. These choices affect the cost and final product.

brackets.title: Bracket type
brackets.description: Select the type of mounting bracket for the luminaires.

visor.title: Visor type
visor.description: The visor controls glare and light pollution.

control.title: Control system
control.description: Choose the Smart Lighting installation option.

details.BASE: Individual per-luminaire control with built-in 5G cellular node. Each fixture can be switched or dimmed independently — maximum granularity. A 5G data plan is required for each luminaire. Suited for small installations needing fine-grained control per fixture.
details.SMART_POLE: Shared 5G control box driving up to 8 luminaires. Manages all lights in a zone with a single data subscription. Luminaire power is wired separately — standard electrical wiring required. Cost-effective option for zone-based control.
details.SMART_POWERBOX: All-in-one box integrating 5G control and power supply for 8 luminaires. Simplifies wiring: a single box at the pole base handles both control and electrical distribution. Recommended for poles 50 ft and taller.
details.SMART_ZONE: Local Wifi boxes orchestrated by a single centralized 5G gateway for the whole site. Each box talks Wifi to its 8 luminaires; one 5G uplink serves the entire project. Drastically reduces recurring data plan costs on large multi-pole installations.
details.SMART_POWERBOX_BT: Control + power box driving 8 luminaires over Bluetooth. No recurring data plan — operated locally via mobile app or dedicated gateway. Ideal for sites without cellular coverage or to eliminate long-term subscription fees.

crossarms.title: Replace crossarms?
crossarms.description: Do you want to replace existing crossarms during the install?

TerrainList.title: My fields
TerrainList.subtitle: Add each field to be equipped. For each field: address, satellite capture, perimeter and pole placement.
TerrainList.incompleteHint: Incomplete field(s): {names}. Complete every step (identity, perimeter, poles, configuration) before continuing.
TerrainList.missingKey: The mapping tool is temporarily unavailable. Please try again in a few minutes or contact us if the problem persists.
TerrainList.confirmDeleteBody: "{name}" and all its data will be permanently deleted.
TerrainList.addSubtitle: Type the address, capture the satellite view, draw the field and place the poles.

Estimation.title: Estimation tool
Estimation.subtitle: Standards compliance and LED conversion — municipal sports lighting

step1.title: Park address
step1.subtitle: Enter the civic address of the park to be equipped. The map shows a satellite view for visual confirmation.
step1.mapHint: Tip: in Google Maps, right-click > Measure distance to estimate field surface.
step1.hintTypeAddress: Type a Quebec address. The map centers automatically.

step2.title: Sports fields
step2.subtitle: Add each field to be equipped. The IES class determines required illuminance levels.
step2.surfaceM2Hint: Measured on Google Maps or municipal blueprint.

step3.title: Existing poles
step3.subtitle: For each field, list the existing poles. The 1-for-1 replacement scenario uses this data.

step4.title: Product configuration
step4.subtitle: For each field, choose the Lightpro OM module and options.
step4.hqOseEligible: My organization is eligible for HQ-OSE 5.1

step5.title: Budget summary
step5.subtitle: Preview of your estimate. On the next step, fill in your contact info to receive the detailed report by email.
step5.verdictNoGo: Detailed study required — additional poles needed
step5.notIncludedTitle: What this summary does not include
notIncluded: Upgrade or replacement of existing poles
step5.notAQuoteLine1: An official quote is issued only after a full photometric study and an on-site survey.
step5.notAQuoteLine2: A detailed photometric study is required. Contact us to schedule a site visit (to perform the study) and receive a more accurate estimate.
step5.notAQuoteLine3: We can also reach out to your local electrician for guidance on the budgetary evaluation.
step5.scenarioASubtitle: Direct LED replacement of existing fixtures
step5.scenarioBSubtitle: Per IES RP-6 standard for the activity
step5.noStandardAvailable: No standard available for this activity
step5.noStandardBody: A custom 1:1 photometric study is required.
step5.deltaHigher: Extra cost to meet the standard

step6.title: Receive your report by email
step6.subtitle: Fill in your contact info — we send you the detailed report immediately, no commitment.
step6.consent: I agree that Lightbase may use this information to contact me about this project (Law 25).
step6.requestQuote: I'd like to receive a detailed estimate from the Lightbase team
step6.requestQuoteHint: An advisor will reach out to schedule a site visit and provide a priced commercial offer.
step6.successBody: Check your inbox ({email}). Our team may follow up with an official quote or a detailed study.
step6.errorBody: Something went wrong. Check your information or try again.

Gate.title: Lightpro OM estimation tool
Gate.subtitle: This tool contains confidential information. Please accept the terms below and verify your identity to gain access.
Gate.ndaGoverned: Governed by the laws of Quebec and Canada
Gate.ndaIntro: This portal contains confidential and proprietary information belonging to Lightbase, including concepts, technical documentation, budget estimates, methodologies, technological approaches, business information, studies, renderings, strategies, and other non-public information.
Gate.ndaEngagement: By accessing this dossier, the representative of the municipality, city, public agency, consulting firm, regional authority, or related entity ("Recipient") acknowledges and agrees to the following:
Gate.clause1Body: The confidential information is provided solely for the purpose of evaluating a potential project, solution, collaboration, or internal review process.
Gate.clause2Body: The Recipient agrees to protect the confidential information using reasonable care and not disclose it to unauthorized third parties, except to employees, consultants, or representatives who require access in connection with their mandate.
Gate.clause5Body:
All documents, concepts, visuals, methodologies, systems, drawings, studies, and related materials remain the exclusive property of Lightbase, unless otherwise agreed in writing.

No reproduction, commercial use, or distribution rights are granted without prior written authorization.
Gate.clause6Body: The confidentiality obligations under this agreement shall remain in effect for twenty-four (24) months following access to the dossier.
Gate.clause7Body: This agreement shall be governed by the applicable laws of the Province of Quebec and Canada.
Gate.ndaClosing: By submitting this form, the Recipient acknowledges having read, understood, and accepted the terms above.
Gate.acceptCheckbox1: I confirm that I have read and accepted the confidentiality terms above.
Gate.acceptCheckbox2: I also confirm that I am authorized to access these materials on behalf of my organization.
Gate.submitError: Something went wrong. Please review your information and try again.
Gate.networkError: Network error. Please check your connection and try again.
Gate.magicLinkExpired: The access link has expired. Please submit the form again.
Gate.magicLinkInvalid: The access link is invalid. Please submit the form again.
Gate.magicLinkError: Something went wrong during verification. Please try again.
Gate.loi25: Your information is collected solely to validate your access and is handled in accordance with Quebec's Act 25 on personal information protection.
Gate.procurementDisclaimer: This portal does not constitute a public tender process or official procurement procedure.
Gate.codeStageBody: A 6-character access code has been sent to {email}. Enter it below or click the link in the email to access the tool.
Gate.codeSpamHint: Don't see the email? Check your spam or junk folder. The code expires in 15 minutes.
Gate.invalidCode: Invalid code. Check and try again.
Gate.expiredCode: This code has expired. Submit the form again to receive a new one.
